zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus於1314年出生在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮時，他的父親Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland29歲，母親Margaret Mar44歲。他於大約1359年與Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1371年6月19日在英國蘇格蘭莫雷度福斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus于1314年出生在苏格兰薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮时，他的父亲Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland29岁，母亲Margaret Mar44岁。他于大约1359年与Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1371年6月19日在英国苏格兰莫雷度福斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus was born in 1314, in Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, his father, Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Mar, was 44. He married Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen about 1359. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 June 1371, in Duffus, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus est né en 1314, à Golspie, Sutherland, Écosse, son père, Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mar, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen environ 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1371, à Duffus, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus 1314 in Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Mar 44. Er hat um 1359 Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juni 1371 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Duffus, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus è nato il nel 1314 nel Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, il suo padre, Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mar, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen circa 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 giugno 1371, nel Duffus, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffusが1314年にスコットランドススエルランドゴルスパで生まれた時，父Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherlandは29歳，母Margaret Marは44歳であった。約1359年にMary-nic-Reginald le Chenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1371年6月19日にイギリススコットランドモーアイダフウスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus(이)가 1314년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드 골스피에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mar(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1371년 6월 19일 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 더프스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus nasceu em 1314, em Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, seu pai, Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mar, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen aproximadamente 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1371, em Duffus, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus родился в 1314 г. в местности голспи, сутирланд, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mar, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen около 1359 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июня 1371 г. в местности дуффус, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Sutherland 1st Laird of Duffus nació en 1314, en Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland, su papá, Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Mar, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Mary-nic-Reginald le Chen aproximadamente 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de junio de 1371, en Duffus, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
